Motion To Approve Accounting, Direct Payment Of Proceeds And Discharge Referee
Off Calendar Jun-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Edward A. Koplowitz; MacInnis, Donner & Koplowitz; 415-434-2400; appearing in person on behalf of plaintiff/cross-defendant Naz Auto Services, Inc., a California Corporation.
David S. Rosenbaum; McDowall Cotter, APC; 650-572-7933; appearing in person on behalf of partition referee Michael G. Kasolas.
Michael Kang; Wood Litigation, APC; 415-247-7900; appearing via CourtCall on behalf of defendant/cross-complainant Joseph Tierney.
Michael G. Kasolas; partition referee; appearing in person as attendee.

Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, raquel@transcriptlegal.com, 925-384-0003.

Plaintiff contests the tentative ruling. After hearing oral arguments the court rules as follows: NOTICE OF MOTION BY PARTITION REFEREE, MICHAEL G. KASOLAS TO APPROVE ACCOUNTING, DIRECT PAYMENT OF PROCEEDS AND DISCHARGE REFEREE is GRANTED. Accounting approved based on 1) original report, 2) except for items referenced in supplemental report. Costs to be shared 50/50. Counsel for partition referee to prepare order in compliance with CRC Rule 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, raquel@transcriptlegal.com, 925-384-0003 (D501)
